description_long: This stuffed toy features a rounded, light blue body with two elongated, flat legs and two arms extending from its sides. The head is white and oval-shaped, with two small, upright ears and a pair of closed, curved eyes that give it a peaceful, sleepy expression. The toy has two small, pink oval shapes near the head, likely representing cheeks or inner ears. Two black, circular objects with yellow spots, resembling cartoonish insects or decorative patches, are positioned near the toy. The surface appears soft and plush, typical of a cuddly toy. The overall design is simple, with minimal facial features and a gentle, inviting appearance.
description: A soft, light blue and white stuffed toy with a rounded body, closed eyes, and cartoonish black-and-yellow decorative patches. It has a peaceful, sleepy expression and a plush, cuddly appearance.
description_view_0: Viewed from above the head, the toy's white head, upright ears, and one black-and-yellow patch are visible, with the body mostly obscured.
description_view_1: From the side, the full length of the toy's body, arms, legs, and both black-and-yellow patches are visible, highlighting the closed eyes and pink cheeks.
description_view_2: From the back, the rounded blue body and the back of the head are visible, with one black-and-yellow patch seen at a distance.
description_view_3: From the opposite side, the toy's body, arms, legs, and both black-and-yellow patches are visible, with the head turned away.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is peaceful and sleepy, with closed, curved eyes and no visible mouth. The overall look is gentle and calm.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Lying on its back with arms and legs extended outward, head facing up, and ears upright.
